title: drosera macrantha var. minor
intro: Drosera macrantha var. minor, also known as the lesser sundew, is a carnivorous plant species that belongs to the Droseraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues and wounds. The health benefits of Drosera macrantha var. minor include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, as well as its potential to help manage stress and promote overall well-being. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tinctures, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote health.
